ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example

ruleScores.issue: Related section has inconsistent relationship types - Security appears as 'consult', 'overlaps', and 'delegates' which creates unclear boundaries
Most tools are specifically named (ESLint, TypeScript, Zod) but 'Custom ESLint Rule' and 'Custom Linter' are somewhat generic

ruleScores.ruleName: Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present with proper structure
All 8 rules have proper severity and enforcement labels in correct format
Rule count of 8 is within the 5-9 bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples
Version 1.0 and last_updated 2026-04-09 properly specified in YAML
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules
Tool Integration table is complete with specific coverage levels
gaps: Related section shows Security agent with three different relationship types (consult, overlaps, delegates) which creates boundary confusion
Some enforcement tools like 'Custom ESLint Rule' and 'Custom Linter' could be more specific
Boundary statements could be clearer about exact handoff points between agents
